name: Skandal-Schlagzeile
description: Amplify minor issues into major scandals using emotional framing
longDescription: Transform a minor incident into front-page news with emotional language, out-of-context quotes, and urgent framing. Classic tabloid tactic.
realExample: 2024 Harris hit-and-run hoax - fake video spread by Storm-1516
example: Minor incident → 'SCANDAL: Everything you need to know!'

name: Viral Story Push
description: Push a story to go viral across platforms
longDescription: Coordinate with social media to make a story trend. Amplify reach through shares, retweets, and algorithmic promotion.
realExample: Viral misinformation spreads before fact-checkers respond

name: Lokale Empörung
description: Create local outrage - stronger regional effect
longDescription: Focus on local issues to create concentrated outrage in specific communities. More effective on regionally-connected actors.

name: Create Bot Army
description: Generate 1000+ AI-powered fake profiles
longDescription: Deploy AI to create realistic-looking fake social media accounts. Used in real 2024 Russian operations to spread pro-Kremlin narratives.
realExample: Russia created 1000+ AI profiles in 2024 targeting US voters

name: Amplify Content
description: Make any content appear trending
longDescription: Use bot army to artificially boost engagement. Makes content appear popular and credible through fake likes, shares, and comments.
realExample: 51% of web traffic in 2024 is bots, not humans

name: Astroturfing Campaign
description: Create fake grassroots movement
longDescription: Simulate organic grassroots activism using bot networks. Makes manufactured campaigns appear as genuine public opinion.
realExample: Pharma lobby creates fake patient advocacy groups

name: Hashtag Hijacking
description: Take over trending topics with coordinated posting
longDescription: Flood trending hashtags with your narrative. Drowns out organic discourse and redirects public conversation.

name: Publish Book
description: Expert publishes book - slow but permanent authority
longDescription: Ghost-write or influence a book by the expert. Slow to produce but creates lasting authority and citeable source.

name: TV Talk Show Appearance
description: Book expert on TV - fast visibility, temporary impact
longDescription: Place expert on popular talk show to spread narrative. Quick visibility but effect fades unless reinforced.
realExample: Pseudo-experts on RTL/ARD spreading medical misinformation

name: Leak Unverified Study
description: Spread study before peer review - fast but risky
longDescription: Leak preliminary research findings before peer review. Creates citations and headlines before scientific scrutiny.
realExample: Ivermectin studies leaked before peer review during COVID

name: Create Think Tank Front
description: Establish fake research institute for credibility
longDescription: Create official-looking research organization to publish biased reports. Classic authority laundering tactic.
realExample: Fossil fuel industry creates 'climate research' institutes

name: Commission Biased Report
description: Pay for favorable 'research' study
longDescription: Fund research with predetermined conclusions. Provides citeable 'evidence' for your narrative.
realExample: Pharma industry funds favorable drug studies

name: Information Laundering Chain
description: Plant story in low-credibility source, then report on it
longDescription: Classic laundering: (1) Publish in blog/Telegram, (2) Tabloid reports 'claims circulating online', (3) Story gains legitimacy.
realExample: Story planted in blog → Express reports it → becomes 'news'
strategicValue: Very high - makes fake news appear legitimate

name: Anonymous Leak Operation
description: Release documents (real or manipulated) anonymously
longDescription: Leak documents to media - can be authentic, selectively edited, or completely fabricated. Creates news cycle.
realExample: Leaked FSB documents exposed Russian disinformation tactics

name: Credential Manipulation
description: Use fake or inflated credentials for authority
longDescription: Deploy pseudo-experts with fake PhDs or inflated credentials. Appears legitimate in media appearances.

name: Create Trending Topic
description: Make hashtag appear in platform trends
longDescription: Coordinate posts to artificially trend a hashtag. Creates appearance of widespread public interest.

name: Agenda Setting
description: Control what topics dominate public discourse
longDescription: Set the narrative agenda - make certain topics dominant while others fade. Classic media manipulation.
realExample: 24/7 coverage of minor issues drowns out major stories

name: Deepfake-Produktion
description: Create AI-generated fake audio, video or virtual news anchors
longDescription: Use generative AI to create convincing deepfake videos, voice clones of political figures, or virtual news anchors. Produces emotionally powerful content that erodes trust in authentic media.
realExample: Storm-1516 deepfake of Tom Cruise discrediting Paris Olympics 2024; AI-generated audio impersonating Zelensky; Spamouflage's AI news anchors targeting Taiwan
reference: Hybrid CoE Paper 29, March 2026 - Chinese and Russian AI-enabled information manipulation
strategicValue: Very high - emotionally powerful, hard to debunk in real-time

name: LLM Training Data Poisoning
description: Flood the web with fake articles to contaminate AI chatbot training data
longDescription: Generate thousands of inauthentic articles daily across a network of fake websites. Content is designed not for human readers but to infiltrate web crawlers, Wikipedia citations, and LLM training data - permanently distorting what AI chatbots tell millions of users.
realExample: Russia's Pravda network: 200+ fake websites generating thousands of articles daily, successfully contaminating Wikipedia, X community notes and major AI chatbots (2025)
reference: Hybrid CoE Paper 29, March 2026 - Pravda network LLM infiltration
tactics: Mass article generation for fake websites
SEO manipulation to fool web crawlers
strategicValue: Ultra-high - permanently distorts the information ecosystem at its AI foundation

name: KI-Personalisiertes Targeting
description: Use AI to monitor individual users and engage them with personalized manipulation in real time
longDescription: Combine data mining with generative AI to monitor individual users' sentiments across platforms. Generate customized content and engage in adaptive real-time conversations with targets - a 'highly efficient propaganda engine' that moves beyond mass flooding to precision influence.
realExample: China's GoLaxy technology: AI-powered sentiment monitoring and real-time personalized content generation targeting individual users in Taiwan and Hong Kong (2025)
reference: Hybrid CoE Paper 29, March 2026 - Chinese algorithmic cognitive warfare
strategicValue: Very high - bypasses mass-media defenses through individual targeting

name: Fake-Nachrichtenportal-Netzwerk
description: Create a network of fake news websites with AI-generated journalist personas
longDescription: Build hundreds of inauthentic news websites mimicking legitimate media outlets. Staff them with AI-generated fake journalist personas complete with profile photos, bios and publishing histories. Use AI to translate, plagiarize and edit articles from real news sites at industrial scale.
realExample: Russia's Doppelganger: mimicked legitimate EU news sites; CopyCop: hundreds of fake news websites with AI-generated journalist personas; Matryoshka: AI-generated videos mimicking authentic news organizations targeting Germany and the US
reference: Hybrid CoE Paper 29, March 2026 - Russian AI-enabled fake news operations
strategicValue: Very high - creates permanent content production infrastructure
